	AC_BE cwmin  4 cwmax 10 aifs  3 txopLimit   0 -acm ack

	AC_BK cwmin  4 cwmax 10 aifs  7 txopLimit   0 -acm ack

	AC_VO cwmin  2 cwmax  3 aifs  2 txopLimit  47 -acm ack
	      cwmin  2 cwmax  3 aifs  2 txopLimit  47 -acm
	groups: wlan
